name: Meppel (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the roundels and the upper panel
the clover and the lower panel
the two bars beneath the clover

description: A red field strewn with white roundels along the borders, bearing a central panel of white over green charged with a green clover (trefoil) above two short black bars.
history: Flag of the municipality of Meppel in the south-west of the province of Drenthe.

features.role: white roundels arranged around the border
a central panel of white over green
a green clover (trefoil) in the upper panel
